data.title: Striking workers, labour leaders, and community allies to rally outside Province House this morning
data.description: In Halifax, NS, a group consisting of striking long term care workers, community supporters, and labor representatives, such as Candace Rennick, National Secretary Treasurer of Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE), will gather for a rally outside Province House. The primary objective of this demonstration is to urge the government to resume negotiations with the striking workers. The event will feature speeches from notable figures like Candace Rennick and Melissa Marsman, President of Nova Scotia Federation of Labor. This public action aims to support the long term care workers currently on strike.

data.title: AtaiBeckley and PsyPAN Receive a Silver Award in 2026 Patient Participant Index, Reflecting Ongoing Commitment to Participant-Informed Research
data.description: AtaiBeckley Inc. (ATAI) was recently awarded the Silver Award in OVID Health's 2026 Patient Participant Index for their work with Psychedelic Participant Advocacy Network (PsyPAN) in enhancing participant engagement in psychedelic clinical research. The collaboration between AtaiBeckley and PsyPAN aims to improve patient outcomes by creating fast-acting, long-lasting, and convenient mental health treatments. This recognition acknowledges AtaiBeckley's ongoing partnership with PsyPAN to incorporate the perspectives of clinical trial participants into the creation of innovative mental health therapies, and share these insights with the industry.

data.title: Simplilearn Partners With The University of Oklahoma Outreach to Launch the Professional Certificate Program in Project Management With GenAI
data.description: In Plano, Texas on April 27, 2026, Simplilearn, a prominent player in digital upskilling, revealed the rollout of the Professional Certificate Program in Project Management alongside GenAI and in collaboration with The University of Oklahoma Outreach. data.title: TMT Finance Publishes Europe Market Sentiment Report 2026: M&A Optimism Surges as AI Dominates Digital Infrastructure Deal Activity
data.description: A recent survey conducted with 202 senior executives has shown an increasing confidence in mergers and acquisitions (M&A), despite valuation gaps continuing to widen. This data suggests a positive outlook on the M&A landscape. Additionally, it has been predicted that capital markets will play a significant role in reshaping the financing of European digital infrastructure by 2027. These insights were shared in London on April 27, 2026, by TMT Finance, a prominent provider of information and insights on M&A activities in the industry. This survey indicates a shift towards more optimistic sentiments among senior executives regarding M&A, with a focus on the European digital infrastructure sector in the coming years.

data.title: Sumsub Recognized as Leader in Chartis RiskTech Quadrant for Enterprise Fraud Solutions 2026
data.description: For the third year in a row, Sumsub, a worldwide leader in verification and anti-fraud services, has been named a Category Leader by Chartis RiskTech. The recognition extends across financial crime, identity, and compliance reports. This acknowledgment underscores Sumsub's industry-leading position and highlights its excellence in providing cutting-edge solutions in these important areas. The announcement was made in London on April 27, 2026, cementing Sumsub's reputation with a prestigious accolade.

data.title: Tryg - Transactions in connection with share buyback programme
data.description: Tryg A/S revealed on 22 January 2026 their plans to start a share buyback initiative of approximately DKK 1.0 billion. This program adheres to the EU Market Abuse Regulation, EU Regulation no. 596/2014 of 16 April 2014, and the regulations set forth in Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of 8 March 2016, known as the "Safe Harbour Regulation." The share buyback process is scheduled to conclude by 13 May 2026.

data.title: FTI Consulting Appoints Mike Davies to Capital Markets Practice
data.description: Today, on April 27, 2026, FTI Consulting, Inc. revealed the addition of Mike Davies as a Senior Managing Director in the Strategic Communications division. This update comes from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: FCN) where FTI Consulting, Inc. is listed.

data.title: Nidec Announces the Postponement of Disclosure of the Financial Results for the Fiscal Year Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, Nidec Corporation (TOKYO: 6594; OTC US: NJDCY) has announced a delay in the disclosure of their Financial Results for the Fiscal Year Ended March 31, 2026. The company apologizes for any inconvenience caused. The postponement is due to reasons outlined in a press release dated April 17, 2026. Shareholders, investors, and stakeholders are affected by this delay and are advised to stay tuned for further updates.

data.title: Study shows about 3.5% of traders (including market makers, skilled takers) capture 30% of profits, while 67% absorb losses.
data.description: Approximately 3.5% of well-informed traders, such as market makers and skilled takers, are able to generate more than 30% of profits on prediction platforms. Meanwhile, around 67% of users end up bearing all of the losses incurred on these platforms.

data.title: Share buyback programme – week 17
data.description: Several stock exchanges, including Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, and the London Stock Exchange, along with the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority and other stakeholders, are involved in an upcoming financial initiative. This collaboration will bring together various key players in the financial sector to enhance market stability and efficiency. The initiative aims to facilitate smoother operations and trading activities across different platforms, benefiting shareholders and investors.
